headline: Source: UP-BNSF short line selected for LA port rail contract
summary: Alameda Belt Line, co-owned by Union Pacific and BNSF, will negotiate for the contract to provide switching services to the Port of Los Angeles-Long Beach. The post Source: UP-BNSF short line selected for LA port rail contract appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Union Pacific Recognizes 138 Companies with Pinnacle Award for Safely Shipping Hazardous Materials
summary: OMAHA, Neb., April 27, 2026--Union Pacific Railroad recognized 138 companies with the 2025 Pinnacle Award for their dedication and commitment to safely transporting chemicals by rail. The annual award honors customers who implement release prevention protocols, corrective action plans and have zero non-accident releases of regulated hazardous materials shipments.

headline: We're starting to see AI results show up in earnings, says Hightower's Stephanie Link
summary: Stephanie Link, Hightower chief investment strategist, joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the latest market trends, where investors can find opportunity right now, top stock picks, and more.

headline: Why Union Pacific (UNP) Is Up 7.0% After Record Q1 Margins and Efficiency Gains - And What's Next
summary: In the first quarter of 2026, Union Pacific Corporation reported revenue of US$6,217 million and net income of US$1,701 million, with basic and diluted EPS of US$2.87, all modestly higher than a year earlier. Beyond the headline growth, record first-quarter operating income, improved operating ratio to 59.9%, and better safety and productivity metrics underscored efficiency gains despite slightly lower freight volumes. Building on these record results and reaffirmed outlook, we’ll now...

headline: How The Union Pacific (UNP) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Merger Expectations
summary: Union Pacific’s updated fair value estimate sits at US$287.74, up from US$272.33, putting a higher modeled price level in focus for anyone tracking the stock. That move lines up with a recent tilt toward higher price targets from bullish research, even as a few trims and more neutral stances signal that not every concern around valuation and the Norfolk Southern transaction is cleared. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these shifting targets and keep up with the evolving analyst...
